comparison_metadata.note: Reader does not implement OPC UA server - comparison is based on reader's client usage patterns and internal data structures vs PLC's server structure

reader_architecture.description: Reader acts as OPC UA client, reads NFC tags, communicates with PLCs via custom methods

plc_architecture.description: PLC exposes AAS structure via OPC UA server with variables and methods

architectural_differences.critical_difference: Reader does NOT expose an AAS structure via OPC UA. It only consumes PLC AAS via client calls.

opcua_server.description: Reader does not implement OPC UA server

items.plc_equivalent: Full OPC UA server with namespace
items.impact: Reader cannot expose AAS structure to other systems
No AAS data exposed by reader

items.plc_equivalent: 6 methods (FreeFromPosition, FreeFromQueue, GetStatus, GetSupported, ReportProduct, ReserveAction)
items.impact: Reader cannot provide AAS methods
No namespace to organize AAS elements

direct_variable_access.description: Reader does not directly read/write PLC AAS variables

items.impact: Product ID stored on NFC tag, not synchronized to PLC CurrentId variable
Position not written to PLC CurrentPosition variable
Transport/process status not synchronized to PLC ActionStatus
Product ID not synchronized to PLC ID variable
Product name not available in reader, cannot sync to PLC
AAS Submodel reference not available in reader

plc_methods_not_used.description: Reader does not call PLC AAS methods

items.impact: Reader cannot free positions via PLC method
Reader cannot free queue via PLC method
Reader uses custom IsFinished instead of PLC GetStatus
Reader cannot query supported operations via PLC method
Reader cannot report product information via PLC method
Reader uses custom Rezervation instead of PLC ReserveAction

custom_opcua_methods.description: Reader uses custom OPC UA methods not present in PLC AAS

items.description: Query available cells for process type
items.impact: Reader-specific functionality for cell discovery
Reader-specific reservation validation
Different method signature/implementation than PLC ReserveAction
Reader-specific process control
Different method signature than PLC GetStatus
Reader-specific occupancy reporting

internal_data_structures.description: Reader has internal data structures not exposed via OPC UA

items.impact: Data stored on NFC tag, not in PLC
Recipe state stored on NFC tag
Recipe steps stored on NFC tag
Cell info stored in reader configuration

product_identification.description: Reader stores Product ID as 7-byte UID array, PLC expects String
product_identification.impact: Requires conversion when synchronizing Product ID

current_position.description: Reader stores position as uint16_t, PLC expects String
current_position.impact: Requires string conversion when synchronizing position

recipe_state.description: Reader has structured state data, PLC has single String variable
recipe_state.impact: State information loss when mapping to PLC String format

reservation_id.description: Reader uses uint16_t for reservation IDs, PLC methods expect String

reader_hierarchy.description: Reader has no OPC UA hierarchy (client-only)

structure.methods: Under ObjectsFolder or organized by function

hierarchy_mismatches.impact: Reader cannot provide hierarchical AAS structure - it only consumes PLC hierarchy

reader_access.description: Reader has no OPC UA variables (client-only)

accesslevel_mismatches.impact: Reader cannot expose variables with access levels - it only reads/writes PLC variables via client calls

product_id_storage.description: Product ID stored in different locations
product_id_storage.conflict: Reader reads Product ID from NFC tag but does not write it to PLC variables
product_id_storage.recommendation: Reader should write NFC UID to PLC CurrentId variable after reading tag

position_tracking.conflict: Reader knows its own cell ID but does not update PLC CurrentPosition when product arrives
position_tracking.recommendation: Reader should write its CellInfo.IDofCell to PLC CurrentPosition when NFC tag is detected

transport_status.conflict: Reader tracks transport status on NFC tag but does not sync to PLC ActionStatus
transport_status.recommendation: Reader should update PLC ActionStatus when transport state changes

reservation_methods.recommendation: Reader should use PLC ReserveAction method instead of custom Rezervation, or align method signatures

status_query_methods.conflict: Different method signatures for status queries
status_query_methods.recommendation: Consider using PLC GetStatus method or align method signatures

recipe_state_storage.description: Recipe state stored on NFC tag, not in PLC
recipe_state_storage.reader_location: TRecipeInfo and TRecipeStep[] structures on NFC tag
recipe_state_storage.plc_location: Implicit in ActionStatus and other state variables
recipe_state_storage.conflict: Recipe state is distributed - reader has detailed state on NFC tag, PLC has summary in variables
recipe_state_storage.recommendation: Consider synchronizing key recipe state fields to PLC variables for monitoring

critical_sync_issues.current_behavior: Reader reads Product ID from NFC tag but does not write to PLC
critical_sync_issues.required_behavior: Reader should write NFC UID (converted to string) to PLC CurrentId variable
critical_sync_issues.impact: PLC cannot track which product is at reader location

critical_sync_issues.current_behavior: Reader knows its cell ID but does not update PLC
critical_sync_issues.required_behavior: Reader should write its cell ID (as string) to PLC CurrentPosition when tag detected
critical_sync_issues.impact: PLC cannot track product location in system

critical_sync_issues.current_behavior: Reader tracks transport status on NFC tag but does not sync to PLC
critical_sync_issues.required_behavior: Reader should update PLC ActionStatus when transport completes
critical_sync_issues.impact: PLC cannot monitor transport execution status

critical_sync_issues.required_behavior: Reader should use PLC ReserveAction method for AAS compliance
critical_sync_issues.impact: Inconsistent reservation handling, not using standard AAS method

immediate_actions.description: After reading NFC tag UID, convert to string and write to PLC CurrentId variable (ns=1;i=6101)
immediate_actions.implementation: Add OPC UA variable write after NFC tag read

immediate_actions.description: When NFC tag is detected, write reader's CellInfo.IDofCell (as string) to PLC CurrentPosition variable (ns=1;i=6102)
immediate_actions.implementation: Add OPC UA variable write in tag detection handler

immediate_actions.action: Replace custom Rezervation with PLC ReserveAction
immediate_actions.description: Use PLC ReserveAction method (ns=1;i=7005) instead of custom Rezervation method
immediate_actions.implementation: Modify reservation code to call PLC ReserveAction with proper String argument

immediate_actions.description: Update PLC ActionStatus variable (ns=1;i=6100) when TRecipeStep.IsTransport changes
immediate_actions.implementation: Add OPC UA variable write when transport state changes

optional_improvements.description: Consider using PLC GetStatus (ns=1;i=7002) instead of custom IsFinished
Consider writing key recipe state fields (ActualRecipeStep, RecipeDone) to PLC variables
Consider implementing OPC UA server on reader to expose its own AAS structure
optional_improvements.note: Major architectural change - would require significant refactoring
